name: REIT Undistributed Income Tax Avoidance

eligibility.description: The REIT must calculate and pay out sufficient dividends during the calendar year to meet the 'distributed amount' requirements relative to its 'required distribution'.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoids a 4% excise tax on REITs by meeting specific distribution thresholds (85% of ordinary income and 95% of capital gain net income).
